summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. All features verified: socio edit/delete buttons always visible, payment status toggle (Pendiente↔Pagado), 4 financial stats on Socios page, real income calculation, and /api/financials with paid/pending fields. Backend 15/15 passed. Frontend UI flows confirmed via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: Test data (TEST_Socio_Iter6, TEST_Client_Iter6, TEST_CRUD_Socio) created and cleaned up during backend tests. TEST UI Socio Iter6 created via UI (cleanup by main agent if needed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified working: (1) Socio edit/delete buttons always visible (opacity=1, not hidden); (2) Nuevo Socio button visible and form works; (3) Payment toggle in TeamSection: Clock(amber)=Pendiente, CheckCircle(emerald)=Pagado, toggle persists to backend; (4) Financial breakdown in TeamSection: Pagado/Pendiente equipo rows show when partners assigned; (5) Ingreso Real = total_amount - teamCost (NOT advance_paid); (6) /api/financials returns 6 fields including total_paid_to_partners and total_pending_to_partners; (7) Socios page shows 4 stat cards; (8) Socio cards show per-socio paid/pending breakdown. UI test confirmed: visiting /reservaciones/{id} directly shows correct TeamSection with toggle working.
rca_of_issues: No bugs found in iteration 6 features.
